/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/WinMineApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/MainFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/BoardPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/GameCore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/Preferences.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/SoundMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/PrefDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/BestDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/EnterDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wxmine.dir/src/Resources.cpp.o -o wxmine   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: -L/usr/local/lib -lwx_gtk3u_xrc-3.3 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.3 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.3 -lwx_baseu-3.3 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.3
